title: Florianópolis, SC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Florianópolis, SC: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Florianópolis is a city in SC with a population of 516,524. Santa Catarina’s island capital, famous for its 42 beaches, surfing culture, lagoons, and consistently ranked Brazil’s best quality of life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
